creator: contact@evilham.com
text:
Changelog: https://github.com/fish-shell/fish-shell/releases/tag/3.1.1

This update made one of the patches irrelevant by disabling svn prompt by default, so I removed that patch.

The new version was built under poudriere without network access and tested during normal use for a few minutes (the release came out about 2h ago).
